clusters.justification: Captures the overarching macroscopic processing of emotional valence, mood regulation, and visceral arousal states typically functionally integrated across amygdala, anterior insula, and anterior cingulate networks.

Encompasses the macroscopic computation of subjective reward, cost-benefit analysis, and goal representations that drive motivated behavioral selection within the ventromedial prefrontal and striatal circuitry.

Represents internally generated, referential thought processes dedicated to modeling complex intentional agents, seamlessly spanning representations of one's own autobiographical self and the minds of others via transmodal apex networks.
